scope_summary: Reconciled stale Drive 403 current-state language, added explicit hosted workspace evidence and permission proof commands, blocked real non-.test admin-visible temporary credential imports by default, and deepened presentation/archive protected-record audit coverage.
implementation_summary: Added ALLOW_REAL_TEMP_CREDENTIAL_IMPORT with default-safe real non-.test import blocking in /api/admin/users/import.
Kept fake .test imports allowed for internal proof and added safe audit metadata for blocked real-user imports.
Mapped the workspace admin import policy error to production-safe copy without exposing internal proof account wording on workspace.html.
Added npm run check:workspace:hosted-evidence as an explicit hosted evidence proof alias for the live Drive gate.
Added scripts/check-hosted-workspace-permissions.mjs and npm run check:workspace:hosted-permissions for hosted signed-out and fake role/scope permission checks.
Added presentation slot missing-session/list/transition audits, misc-admin denial, viewed result counts, student no-leak list proof, and empty-scope teacher no-leak proof.
Added archive readiness/export/download missing-session audits and non-admin archive export denial audit.
Updated current docs to supersede the old Drive HTTP 403 blocker with the Shared Drive/live proof state.
hosted_workspace_evidence_proof_result: passed via npm run check:workspace:hosted-evidence against https://senior-capstone-app.pages.dev
small_upload_result: passed: fake .test text file uploaded through app path and downloaded byte-for-byte through app-scoped route
large_resumable_upload_result: passed: fake .test >5MB file uploaded through resumable path and downloaded byte-for-byte
download_result: passed for small text and >5MB resumable proof artifacts through /api/evidence/:id/download
storage_id_leak_check_result: passed: upload response, download headers, dashboard output, and hosted workspace assets omitted forbidden storage identifiers/secrets

skipped_roles: admin fake credential unavailable through ignored credential file/env

credential_delivery_guardrail_result.override: ALLOW_REAL_TEMP_CREDENTIAL_IMPORT=true allows real non-.test imports only when explicitly configured

presentation_slot_proof_result: improved: missing-session list/transition audits, student own/no-leak list proof, misc-admin denial, empty-scope teacher no-leak, conflict, schedule, check-out, and check-in tests passed
archive_export_proof_result: improved: readiness missing-session audit, admin export missing-session/non-admin denial audits, export download missing-session audit, provider/package/download/missing/expired tests passed
cloudflare_check_result: passed via npm run check:cloudflare and npm run check:cloudflare:live; scoped-token wrangler whoami warning remained non-blocking after token verify plus Pages/D1 lookup passed

test_commands.result: partial pass: signed-out, student, program_teacher, mentor, misc_admin passed; admin skipped because fake admin credential unavailable
passed static and live read-only checks
passed: aggregate checks plus 190 passed, 4 expected opt-in skips

generated_output_route_inventory_result: check:route-inventory and check:generated-output-drift passed; no regeneration required
remaining_blockers: Hosted permission-state proof needs an ignored fake admin credential to cover the admin allowed path.
Browser-level upload progress/retry handling remains open.
Google Docs export cases remain open.
Hosted presentation/archive UI proof remains open.
Archive retention policy remains policy_review_required until Bryan decides HD-2026-05-20-007.
